instruction:
Use differentials to estimate the amount of tin in a closed tin can with diameter $8 \mathrm{~cm}$ and height $12 \mathrm{~cm}$ if the tin is $0.04 \mathrm{~cm}$ thick.

Options:
A. 16 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
B. 30 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
C. 12 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
D. 18 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
E. 24 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
F. 20 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
G. 10 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
H. 22 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
I. 26 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
J. 14 $\mathrm{cm^3}$
